title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Ancillary Service Providers General Requirements Module GR-12.2 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Requires ancillary service providers to maintain vulnerability and patch management processes, robust board-level cybersecurity risk frameworks, clear accountability, cyber risk controls, incident detection, recovery and reporting obligations.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk rules for ancillary service providers using digital channels.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines
